parameters.query:
-- Aggregate everything the persona needs into a single JSON blob.
-- This avoids many round trips and keeps the LLM context window contiguous.
SELECT json_build_object(
  'date', CURRENT_DATE,
  'sync_freshness_minutes', (
    SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(last_sync_ts))) / 60
    FROM _meta.sync_state WHERE source = 'slack'
  ),
  'message_count_24h', (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_view.slack_recent_24h
  ),
  'active_channel_count_24h', (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT channel) FROM agent_view.slack_recent_24h
  ),
  'channel_activity', (
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t)), '[]'::json)
    FROM (
      SELECT channel, message_count, active_user_count, top_user
      FROM agent_view.slack_channel_activity_24h
      ORDER BY message_count DESC
      LIMIT 8
    ) t
  ),
  'unanswered_questions', (
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t)), '[]'::json)
    FROM (
      SELECT channel, op_user, op_text, age_hours
      FROM agent_view.slack_threads_with_questions
      WHERE age_hours BETWEEN 6 AND 48
      ORDER BY age_hours DESC
      LIMIT 5
    ) t
  ),
  'decisions', (
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t)), '[]'::json)
    FROM (
      SELECT channel, user_real_name, text, ts
      FROM agent_view.slack_threads_with_decisions
      WHERE ts::numeric >= EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')
      ORDER BY ts DESC
      LIMIT 5
    ) t
  ),
  'action_items', (
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t)), '[]'::json)
    FROM (
      SELECT channel, assignee_user, action_text, ts
      FROM agent_view.slack_action_items
      WHERE ts::numeric >= EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')
      ORDER BY ts DESC
      LIMIT 5
    ) t
  ),
  'high_reaction_messages', (
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t)), '[]'::json)
    FROM (
      SELECT channel, user_real_name, text, reaction_count
      FROM agent_view.slack_high_reaction_messages_24h
      ORDER BY reaction_count DESC
      LIMIT 5
    ) t
  ),
  'quiet_users', (
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t)), '[]'::json)
    FROM (
      SELECT user_real_name, avg_prior_weeks, this_week
      FROM agent_view.slack_quiet_users_7d
      LIMIT 5
    ) t
  )
) AS data;

INSERT INTO _meta.agent_actions (agent, action, view_queried, rows_returned, notes)
VALUES ('comms-agent', 'digest_morning', 'agent_view.slack_*', $1::int, $2);

meta.description: Daily 9am Slack digest from the comms-agent persona. Reads agent_view.slack_* views from the sobol_mirror postgres, passes the aggregated JSON to Ollama with the persona's system prompt embedded, posts the digest to Mattermost (default channel: bot; configurable via COMMS_AGENT_MM_CHANNEL env var). Skips with explanatory message when sync is stale (>120 min) or message volume is zero. Logs every execution to _meta.agent_actions for audit. Also exposes a webhook trigger at POST /webhook/comms-agent-digest for manual on-demand digests during development. Default model: qwen2.5:14b (configurable via COMMS_AGENT_MODEL env var). Requires: setup-postgres-mirror.sh, setup-connector-slack.sh, slack-mirror-sync.json activated and at least one successful sync. Companion to pi-personas/comms-agent/ — the persona definition + this workflow together = the runtime.
